idea.title: Critter Siege
idea.hook: A horde of weird-cute critters pours down the lanes toward your glowing hearth — drop auto-zapping defenders to hold the last line, and every wave brings a new monster AND a new tool.
idea.hook_ru: Орда странно-милых зверушек катится по дорожкам к твоему сияющему очагу — ставь авто-защитников, чтобы удержать последнюю линию, и каждая волна несёт нового монстра И новый инструмент.
idea.prototype: Real-time PORTRAIT lane defense. 5 vertical lanes; weird-cute critters spawn at the TOP and march DOWN toward a glowing hearth at the BOTTOM. Tap a defender in the bottom tray to select it, tap a lane cell to place it; it auto-fires at the nearest critter in its lane. Placement costs SAP, a resource that regenerates (SAP_REGEN=6/s, cap 220) and drops from kills, so you can never wall every lane. New enemy archetype debuts almost every wave (Runner W2, Tank W4, Flyer W6 that skips walls, Shielded W8, Swarmling clusters W9) and a new defender unlocks every ~2 waves (Zapper, Bramble wall, Frost slow, Splash, Sap Tap generator, Howitzer heavy at W11). Brood Boss every 5th wave. 15-wave campaign -> WON -> endless score-attack on bestWave. 5 hearts; each breach -1 (boss -2); lives<=0 = GAMEOVER, reachable from idle play in ~19s.
idea.mutation_of: Mutates 28_tower_defense's defend-the-base frame into a FRESH mechanic in our proven defense family: real-time descending LANES + a regenerating-resource economy + an unlockable roster, NOT a static 5x5 grid TD. Deliberately diverges from every defense game we already shipped (tower_defense static-grid TD, pruners_tower reverse-TD, merge_defense merge-TD, devourling survivor auto-battler, deck_of_dread card roguelite). The danger_combat + weird_creature CTR archetype on today's market-art pull (Age of Heroes, Super Evolution Battle, Westland Survival, Tiny Ranger, Brainrot Arena) is the cover angle; the defense genre's strong retention in our portfolio (103.8s/play genre rollup) is why a fresh-mechanic defense build is the new-game bet.
idea.why_novel: First of our defense games where the threat MARCHES DOWN discrete lanes in real time and the answer is a per-wave-unlocked counter roster paired with a scarcity economy — escalation on BOTH density and new content. The Flyer (skips ground walls, must be shot) and the late Howitzer unlock at W11 keep a 10-minute run introducing new toys past minute 6-8, the exact loop-depth bar. RUTHLESS CLARITY is the design thesis: one-line menu goal, guided first wave, big SAP number, hearts, enemy HP bars, a 6-button thumb-tray, an UP-NEXT chip — engineered against the 'defense games retained but under-LIKED for being fiddly' history.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Lives/hearts (5; each breach -1, boss -2; lives<=0 = GAMEOVER) PLUS resource scarcity (SAP regenerates slowly and drops from kills; defenders cost 10-55, so you cannot afford to wall every lane). No countdown clock — pressure is the descending horde plus the SAP you can't fully afford. Idle play breaches the bottom and drains 5 hearts in ~19s.

sources.title: danger_combat + weird_creature CTR archetype (2026-06-04 pull)
sources.snippet: Cover must read as immediate conflict — a charging horde of weird-cute critters bearing down on a glowing last-defender line, high contrast, aggressive momentum. Composition refs: Age of Heroes, Super Evolution Battle, Westland Survival, Tiny Ranger, Brainrot Arena.

sources.title: Super Evolution Battle (popular, score 100)
sources.snippet: Top popular Yandex card on the 2026-06-04 swipe — horde/battle composition reference for the cover (composition only, no art/IP cloned).

sources.title: Defense genre retains 103.8s/play in our portfolio
sources.snippet: Defense is a high-retention-ceiling family in Tim's portfolio (~103.8s/play genre rollup) but historically under-LIKED for being fiddly/unclear — a fresh-mechanic defense build with ruthless clarity is the new-game bet.

sources.title: Lazy Apocalypse: Zombie Tower Defense & Idle TD (popular)
sources.snippet: Defense/horde title in the live popular set — validates lane/wave defense demand on Yandex (mechanic kept distinct: real-time descending lanes, not idle TD).

synthesizer_brief: Real-time PORTRAIT lane defense. 5 vertical lanes, critters descend from the top toward a hearth at the bottom; tap a bottom-tray defender then a lane cell to place an auto-attacker. SAP economy regenerates + drops from kills so you can't hold every lane. New enemy debuts almost every wave (Runner/Tank/Flyer-skips-walls/Shielded/Swarmling) and a new defender unlocks every ~2 waves (Zapper/Bramble-wall/Frost/Splash/Sap-Tap-gen/Howitzer-heavy@W11); Brood Boss every 5th wave. 15-wave campaign then endless on bestWave. 5 hearts, breaches drain them, lives<=0 = GAMEOVER in ~19s idle. A FRESH mechanic in our proven defense family — explicitly NOT grid TD / reverse TD / merge TD / survivor / card roguelite. Cover = danger_combat charging-horde scene. Thesis: ruthless clarity so a historically-retained-but-under-liked genre finally gets liked.

alternatives.title: Dread Deck Reboot
alternatives.hook: Draft a roguelite deck of spell cards to survive escalating monster rooms
alternatives.why_novel: REJECTED as a dup — deck_of_dread (126) already covers card-roguelite in our catalog.

alternatives.title: Maw Survivor
alternatives.hook: Auto-fire at swarms of beasts while you weave through an arena collecting XP
alternatives.why_novel: REJECTED as a dup — devourling (119) already covers the survivor auto-battler lane.

alternatives.title: Boba Rush Encore
alternatives.hook: Serve a queue of impatient customers their exact drink before they storm off
alternatives.why_novel: REJECTED as a dup — boba_rush (124) already covers the serve-rush family.

alternatives.title: Crowded Critters
alternatives.hook: Merge identical critters on a board to spawn stronger ones that clear the queue
alternatives.why_novel: REJECTED as a dup — the crowded/merge family is already mined (merge_defense 113, crowd_crusher 97); merge TD is on the do-not-drift list.

alternatives.title: Hearth Tycoon
alternatives.hook: Idle-accrue glowing embers overnight and auto-upgrade your defense garden
alternatives.why_novel: REJECTED — pure idle-tycoon with overnight accrual is the iteration job (cross-session retention), wrong shape for a new-build whose bar is the 10-minute core loop.
